## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress and next steps for the PSEO (Pricing Strategy Evaluation and Optimization) pipeline project between GrowthX and Metronome.](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building a modular pipeline to generate PSEO content, including pricing models, historical data, analysis, and Metronome's perspective](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Design collaboration needed; Chang to schedule call with GrowthX and Metronome's design team](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Metronome to provide: 1) target company list, 2) list of key pricing models, 3) internal data/analysis on pricing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Initial test of 10 accounts in \~2-3 weeks, focusing on content quality over design](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)

## Topics

### PSEO Pipeline Development

  - [Two major components: pipeline setup and design work](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=135.0)
  - [Modular pipeline architecture with separate generators for each content block](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Data sources: company websites, community platforms, review sites, historical archives, industry publications](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Building system for quarterly (or faster) refreshes to keep pages current](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=321.0)
  - [Fact-checking integrated into each pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)

### Design Collaboration

  - [GrowthX can handle full design or collaborate based on Metronome's preferences](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [Need to determine division of labor for hub page, sub-pages, and templates](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Chang to schedule call between GrowthX (including Ren) and Metronome's design team (Chris)](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Deployment options: GrowthX pushes to Metronome's GitHub/CMS or establishes steady-state publishing process](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)

### Metronome's Input Needed

  - [List of target companies to start with](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Catalog of pricing models Metronome tracks/cares about most](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [Internal data: analysis docs, sales team insights, customer feedback, competitive analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=351.0)
  - [Rough categorization of internal data to appropriate pricing model "buckets"](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [GrowthX to create shared Notion space for Metronome to input this data](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### Content Quality and Review Process

  - [Initial test with 10 companies in \~2-3 weeks (production-quality pipeline targeted)](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Focus on copy quality over design for first review](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=1010.0)
  - [Iterative feedback to fine-tune the model and reduce revision cycles](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct internal reviews before sharing with Metronome](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Chang to schedule design collaboration call (GrowthX + Metronome teams)](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=267.0)
  - [Metronome to provide target company list and key pricing models list](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=335.0)
  - [Metronome to share internal criteria and pricing analysis examples in shared Notion space (link forthcoming from GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [GrowthX to build initial pipelines and generate test content for 10 companies (\~2-3 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Megan to respond to email thread re: design meeting availability](https://fathom.video/share/8z1Z-r77dySHVT-AQ_VM8E-AwSQy6BMd?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
